benefits.description: Already lost weight gained; helped immensely with weight loss
Helped with energy levels, though still has bad days with fatigue
Noticed difference in overall inflammation and joint pain; had terrible inflammation before peptides
Reduction in joint pain from peptide stack

side_effects.description: Started to get site reactions from BPC/TB500/GHK-Cu/lipo mic/NAD+ stack

protocol_notes: On low dose levothyroxine for approximately 1 year. Tapering off Tirzepatide at time of posting. Uses anti-inflammatory diet. Also taking lipo mic (lipoic acid/B-complex) during peptide stack. Experienced injection site reactions with previous multi-peptide protocol. Still using low dose Tirzepatide for inflammation management. Fixed vitamin deficiencies. Suspects insulin resistance was contributing factor to weight loss resistance.
